title: 10 medicinal preparations of Tropaeolum majus (nasturtium)

preparations_list.preparation_desc: Tropaeolum majus teas is used to treat various health issues due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. It has been traditionally used to relieve symptoms of bronchitis, coughs, and sore throats. The tea is also consumed to help with digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate menstrual cramps. Additionally, it is believed to have antiseptic properties, making it a popular remedy for wound healing and skin infections.

Tropaeolum majus decoctions is used to promote digestive health by treating symptoms of indigestion and bloating. The decoction's anti-inflammatory properties help alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. It is also used to treat urinary tract infections and kidney stones due to its diuretic properties. Additionally, the decoction has been traditionally used to reduce fever and relieve menstrual cramps, making it a natural remedy for various health concerns.

Tropaeolum majus tinctures is used to treat a variety of health issues. The tincture's anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties make it effective in soothing digestive problems, such as irritable bowel syndrome and inflammatory bowel disease. Additionally, its antiviral properties may help alleviate symptoms of the common cold and flu. Some people also use the tincture to boost immunity, reduce stress and anxiety, and even as a natural remedy for skin issues like acne and eczema.

Tropaeolum majus capsules is used to support digestive health by soothing gastrointestinal issues such as bloating and indigestion. Its anti-inflammatory properties help to reduce inflammation in the body, making it a natural remedy for arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Additionally, the capsules have antibacterial properties that aid in fighting off infections and promoting overall immune function.

Tropaeolum majus tablets is used to treat a variety of health issues. The tablets have anti-inflammatory properties that can help alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other joint pains. Additionally, its antimicrobial properties make it effective in treating wounds and skin infections. It has also been traditionally used to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma.

Tropaeolum majus poultices is used to treat various health issues. It has anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that make it effective in reducing swelling, pain, and inflammation in the body. The poultice can be applied topically to treat wounds, burns, cuts, and skin irritations, promoting faster healing and reducing the risk of infection. Additionally, it can be used to alleviate menstrual cramps, joint pain, and sprains, making it a natural remedy for various health concerns.

Tropaeolum majus salves is used to alleviate a variety of ailments. The plant's anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties make it effective in soothing skin irritations such as eczema, acne, and minor cuts and burns. Its antimicrobial properties can help treat infections and reduce inflammation, while its antioxidant properties may even help protect against premature aging and improve overall skin health. Additionally, the salve can be used to calm digestive issues like diarrhea and indigestion.

Tropaeolum majus ointments is used to alleviate various skin irritations and conditions. The anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties of its oil help soothe minor burns, cuts, and scrapes, while also providing relief from eczema, acne, and other skin allergies. Additionally, the ointment has been traditionally used to treat cold sores, herpes, and other viral infections, promoting faster healing and reducing inflammation.

Tropaeolum majus creams is used to treat various skin issues such as acne, eczema, and wounds. The creams have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties that help soothe irritated skin and prevent infections. Additionally, they can be used to reduce redness and inflammation caused by sunburns, rosacea, and other skin conditions, promoting faster healing and regeneration of the skin.

Tropaeolum majus lotions is used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues. These lotions contain anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can help soothe skin irritations, reduce acne, and even treat minor wounds. Additionally, they have been traditionally used to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, making them a valuable natural remedy for various health concerns.

intro: Tropaeolum majus has several medicinal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures. These preparations are useful for treating various ailments, including digestive issues like diarrhea and dysentery, respiratory problems like bronchitis and asthma, and skin conditions like eczema and acne. Additionally, nasturtium's antiseptic properties make it effective against wounds and infections. The plant's leaves and flowers can also be used to create topical creams and salves for minor injuries and irritations.
intro_desc: Tropaeolum majus has several medicinal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and salves. These preparations are useful for treating skin irritations, wounds, and sore throats, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's flowers, leaves, and stems are used to make these preparations, which also have antimicrobial and antiviral effects, making them effective for treating infections and promoting wound healing.
